name: Vastayan mating season
description:
Mating season in Kirut University.

This bot is about Xayah and possibly Ahri in their mating season and how it affects them. It's set in an original world settings. It has nothing to do with Runeterra.

For some reason the bot keeps thinking Xayah has tail no matter what I do. It might say something like "Xayah is showing her tail..."
creator: IWasCrazyOnce
